title: Elon Musk calls for Delaware judge to recuse herself in lawsuits, alleging bias
summary: The Tesla and SpaceX CEO is calling for a judge to recuse herself in two shareholder lawsuits that are winding their way through Delaware's courts.

title: Space stocks rally on reports of SpaceX's imminent IPO filing
summary: Space stocks, including AST SpaceMobile, Rocket Lab and Firefly Aerospace, rallied after a report that SpaceX may file to go public this week.
